creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
Created attachment 186909
Remove mentions of MSN and Yahoo! from descriptions of libpurple and pidgin ports

libpurple dropped support for Yahoo! and MSN in March:

http://www.omgubuntu.co.uk/2017/03/pidgin-drops-facebook-xmpp

The patch updated package-descriptions to remove mentions of the removed protocols.
